evals.prompt: Write a component that sends the user's voice transcription (from ASR) to an LLM via the Remote Service Gateway and speaks the response.
evals.expected_output: A script using VoiceASRModule for text capture and RSG for AI inference.
expectations: Listens for onTranscriptionFinished or similar ASR event
Calls remoteServiceGateway.sendRequest(request, callback) with the prompt
Inside callback, passes response text to TextToSpeechModule

evals.prompt: Create a vision-AI loop that captures a camera frame every 5 seconds and asks an AI agent 'What do you see?'
evals.expected_output: A script using CameraModule for frame capture and RSG for vision model requests.
expectations: Uses a timer or UpdateEvent for the 5s interval
Calls cameraModule.requestTexture(callback) to get a frame
Includes the camera frame as a 'vision' attachment in the RSG request
